title: tagetes minuta
intro: Tagetes minuta, also known as Mexican marigold or African marigold, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes minuta include reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
